ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Rice flour 34%, chickpea flour 29%, dehydrated potato 10%, pea protein 9%, potato starch 6%, spicy red pepper 6% (paprika 29%, maltodextrin, salt, sugar, onion, yeast extract, tomato, paprika extract, spice), sunflower oil 6%.
